summary: Composed cookie auth fixes: AuthHeader() returns the raw s_utkn JWT with no Bearer scheme (the client sets it as the custom s_utkn header, which requires the raw token); auth logout now also deletes the persisted cookie jar (new client.ClearCookieJar); and login validation probes the authenticated appointments endpoint (POST myaccount/purchases/appointments with s_utkn + session cookies) instead of a HEAD to the public homepage.
reason: Vagaro requires header 's_utkn: <raw-JWT>' (no scheme); a Bearer prefix broke every authed command. Logout left the .vagaro.com cookie jar on disk so later commands still rode the old session. The old public-homepage HEAD returned 200 for any stale session, so validation passed sessions that then failed real API calls.
